## Public Sources

records, or other source links.

## Safety Check

- [ ] Photos were taken from lawful public viewpoints.
- [ ] Sensitive signage, telecom/RF equipment, access panels, and security
      details are cropped, blurred, or omitted.
- [ ] This issue does not include access instructions, gate details, security
      details, or operationally sensitive information.
